page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360-lssd is a high-capacity server instance powered by the AMD EPYC 9B14 processor, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 360 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped from 180 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 1440 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. Storage is bundled with 32 local NVMe SSDs, totaling 12864 GB of high-speed local storage. No hardware GPU accelerators are present on this instance.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core CPU and memory performance. The instance achieves top 10% rankings in stress-ng multi-core CPU benchmarks, Passmark CPU scores, and Passmark memory scores. Large-block memory bandwidth tests show read speeds of 701.37 GB/sec and write speeds of 335.55 GB/sec. Single-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for Geekbench single-core and stress-ng single-core tests. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16, and cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI, which contributes to top-tier performance in encryption and physics simulations.

This server is highly optimized for massive database operations, high-throughput web serving, and heavy parallel processing workloads. It demonstrates top-tier efficiency in Redis SET operations, database transactions, and static web serving throughput. The inclusion of 12864 GB of local NVMe SSD storage makes it highly cost-efficient for IOPS-intensive applications and large-scale data processing without requiring external storage attachments. However, single-threaded tasks like gzip compression perform at average levels, indicating that workloads should be highly parallelized to fully exploit the hardware profile. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, software compilation, and prompt processing in LLM inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360-lssd is a high-density server configured with 360 dedicated vCPUs from an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor and 1440 GB of RAM. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 32 local NVMe SSDs providing 12864 GB of bundled high-speed storage, with no GPU accelerators. It delivers top-tier performance in multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations, supported by AVX-512 and cryptographic instruction sets. While single-threaded performance is moderately strong, its multi-threaded capabilities excel, as evidenced by top 10% scores in Passmark CPU and Redis SET operations. This server is highly cost-efficient for large-scale, I/O-intensive workloads, making it an excellent fit for massive databases, high-throughput web serving, software compilation, and parallel data processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360-lssd features 360 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 1440 GB RAM, and 12864 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-360-lssd is a 360-vCPU server with 1440 GB RAM and 12864 GB NVMe SSD storage, optimized for database workloads.
tagline: A high-density, multi-core x86 platform featuring massive local NVMe storage and top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
bullet_points: 360 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors.
12864 GB of bundled high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across 32 drives.
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database transaction performance.
Advanced instruction support including AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration.
Optimized for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and parallel data processing.
